title: Awakening Experience
definition: A profound shift in perception and understanding, leading to the realization of the self-illusion.

difficulty_levels.beginner: An extraordinary moment when someone realizes that their sense of self is an illusion, often accompanied by feelings of peace and liberation.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A transformative experience in which the individual transcends the limitations of a dualistic worldview, resulting in non-dual awareness and selfless consciousness.
difficulty_levels.expert: A phase transition in consciousness, characterized by a perceptual shift from a self-centered to an interconnected perspective, with profound implications for selfhood, morality, and the nature of reality.

extra_fields.insight: The moment when one understands that all phenomena are not-self (anattā), leading to the extinction of the illusion of the self.
